guide.witch-hat-atelier-mod.text.tagline: A field guide to magic written one careful line at a time.
guide.witch-hat-atelier-mod.text.welcome: This mod brings a quiet, craft-focused school of magic into Minecraft: spells are learned with ink, observation, and a steady hand.
It is inspired by the sense of wonder and drawn magic found in Witch Hat Atelier.
guide.witch-hat-atelier-mod.text.getting: Begin by finding an ink sac. Squid drop them in rivers and oceans.
Keep the ink close. It is the first material an apprentice needs before learning to draw magic.
guide.witch-hat-atelier-mod.text.basic_p: Magic is not cast through willpower or incantation. It is drawn. Anyone can create a magical effect by inscribing a precise geometric glyph with special ink.
The drawing is the spell. A steady hand, geometric precision, and a practiced symbol vocabulary matter more than raw power.
A glyph begins with a base circle. Symbols placed inside it define an effect such as light, motion, binding, or illusion.
Accuracy matters. A broken line or wrong angle can make a spell fail or behave unpredictably.
Glyphs may be drawn on paper, cloth, walls, or the ground.
Ink is the fuel. Without proper ink, even a perfect circle remains only a drawing.
guide.witch-hat-atelier-mod.text.items.1: Ink sac — the apprentice's first source of spell ink. Find squid in rivers and oceans.
guide.witch-hat-atelier-mod.text.items.2: Spellbook — carries these notes and the glyphs you have learned. Tip: keep it in your hotbar while exploring.
Workshop blocks will be recorded here as they are added. Each entry will show its purpose, inputs, outputs, and a practical tip.
guide.witch-hat-atelier-mod.text.mobs.1: Magical creatures will be recorded here with their behavior, drops, and the safest way to approach them.
guide.witch-hat-atelier-mod.text.structu: Discoverable workshops and magical landmarks will be recorded here with their location and secrets.
guide.witch-hat-atelier-mod.text.wind.1: Creates a focused current of air. Use it to move light objects or soften a fall.
guide.witch-hat-atelier-mod.text.wind.2: Drawing: enclose two flowing, offset lines inside the base seal.
guide.witch-hat-atelier-mod.text.light.1: Produces a steady magical light without heat.
guide.witch-hat-atelier-mod.text.light.2: Drawing: place a filled light mark at the exact center of the base seal.
guide.witch-hat-atelier-mod.text.water.1: Calls and directs a small stream of clean water.
guide.witch-hat-atelier-mod.text.water.2: Drawing: pass two parallel channels through the center of the base seal.
guide.witch-hat-atelier-mod.text.credits: Created by Oshino. Inspired by the illustrated magic and craftsmanship of Witch Hat Atelier.
Built for Fabric on Minecraft 1.21.1. Configuration and compatibility notes will appear here as the mod grows.
